name: Country Herb Roasted Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 to 3 pounds chicken, cut into serving pieces
1 envelope Lipton Savory Herb with Garlic Recipe Soup Mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Place chicken in a 13 x 9-inch baking pan.
3. In a small bowl, combine the remaining ingredients; brush on the chicken.
4. Bake for 45 minutes or until the chicken is cooked through.
5. Makes about 4 servings.
